# RealEstate Web Application - Consolidated Design Specification

---

## 1. Flask Routes and Page Details

| Page Name           | Flask Route                        | HTTP Methods | Page Title               | Template Filename        | Description                                      |
|---------------------|----------------------------------|--------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|--------------------------------------------------|
| Dashboard           | `/`                              | GET          | Real Estate Dashboard    | dashboard.html           | Main hub; featured properties and navigation    |
| Property Search     | `/search` (preferred) or `/properties` (alt.) | GET          | Property Search          | property_search.html     | List and filter properties                       |
| Property Details    | `/property/<int:property_id>` (preferred) or `/properties/<int:property_id>` (alt.) | GET          | Property Details         | property_details.html    | Details of specific property                    |
| Property Inquiry    | `/inquiry/submit` (preferred) or `/inquiries/new` (alt.) | GET, POST     | Submit Property Inquiry  | property_inquiry.html    | Form to submit inquiry                          |
| My Inquiries        | `/inquiries`                     | GET          | My Inquiries             | my_inquiries.html        | List all user inquiries                         |
| Delete Inquiry      | `/inquiries/delete/<int:inquiry_id>` | POST       | (action only)            | n/a                      | Delete a specific inquiry                       |
| My Favorites        | `/favorites`                    | GET          | My Favorite Properties   | my_favorites.html        | List user's favorite properties                |
| Remove Favorite     | `/favorites/remove/<int:property_id>` | POST       | (action only)            | n/a                      | Remove a property from favorites               |
| Agent Directory     | `/agents`                      | GET          | Real Estate Agents       | agent_directory.html     | List and search agents                          |
| Locations Page      | `/locations`                   | GET          | Featured Locations       | locations.html           | List popular locations                          |

---

## 2. Template Filenames

Standardized the template filenames to the preferred form where possible:

- dashboard.html
- property_search.html
- property_details.html
- property_inquiry.html
- my_inquiries.html
- my_favorites.html
- agent_directory.html
- locations.html

Alternate filenames used in candidate B (like properties_search.html, inquiries.html, favorites.html, agents.html) are consolidated to preferred consistent names matching candidate A.

---

## 3. Element and Button IDs

### 3.1 Dashboard Page (`dashboard.html`)
- `dashboard-page` (Div) - Container for dashboard page
- `featured-properties` (Div) - Featured property recommendations
- `browse-properties-button` (Button) - Navigate to Property Search page
- `my-inquiries-button` (Button) - Navigate to My Inquiries page
- `my-favorites-button` (Button) - Navigate to My Favorites page

### 3.2 Property Search Page (`property_search.html`)
- `search-page` (Div) - Container of search page
- `location-input` (Input) - Filter input for location/city
- `price-range-min` (Input number) - Minimum price filter
- `price-range-max` (Input number) - Maximum price filter
- `property-type-filter` (Dropdown) - Filter property type (House, Apartment, Condo, Land)
- `properties-grid` (Div) - Grid for displaying property cards
- Dynamic Button IDs:
  - `view-property-button-{property_id}` (Button) for each listed property

### 3.3 Property Details Page (`property_details.html`)
- `property-details-page` (Div) - Container for property details
- `property-address` (H1) - Displays address
- `property-price` (Div) - Displays price
- `property-description` (Div) - Property description
- `property-features` (Div) - Beds, baths, square footage
- `add-to-favorites-button` (Button) - Add property to favorites
- `submit-inquiry-button` (Button) - Navigate to inquiry submission

### 3.4 Property Inquiry Page (`property_inquiry.html`)
- `inquiry-page` (Div) - Container for inquiry form
- `select-property` (Dropdown) - Select property for inquiry
- `inquiry-name` (Input) - Customer name
- `inquiry-email` (Input email) - Customer email
- `inquiry-phone` (Input tel) - Customer phone
- `inquiry-message` (Textarea) - Inquiry message
- `submit-inquiry-button` (Button) - Submit inquiry form

### 3.5 My Inquiries Page (`my_inquiries.html`)
- `inquiries-page` (Div) - Container for inquiries listing
- `inquiries-table` (Table) - Table of inquiries
- `inquiry-status-filter` (Dropdown) - Filter inquiries by status (All, Pending, Contacted, Resolved)
- Dynamic Button IDs:
  - `delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id}` (Button) for each inquiry delete action
- `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Navigate to Dashboard

### 3.6 My Favorites Page (`my_favorites.html`)
- `favorites-page` (Div) - Container for favorites list
- `favorites-list` (Div) - List of favorite properties
- Dynamic Button IDs:
  - `remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id}` (Button) to remove from favorites
  - `view-property-button-{property_id}` (Button) to view property details
- `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Navigate to Dashboard

### 3.7 Agent Directory Page (`agent_directory.html`)
- `agents-page` (Div) - Container for agents list
- `agents-list` (Div) - List of agents
- `agent-search` (Input) - Search agents by name
- Dynamic Button IDs:
  - `contact-agent-button-{agent_id}` (Button) to contact agent
- `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Navigate to Dashboard

### 3.8 Locations Page (`locations.html`)
- `locations-page` (Div) - Container for locations list
- `locations-list` (Div) - List of locations
- Dynamic Button IDs:
  - `view-location-button-{location_id}` (Button) to view location properties
- `location-sort` (Dropdown) - Sort locations by Name, Properties Count, Average Price
- `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Navigate to Dashboard

---

## 4. Template Context Variables

### 4.1 Dashboard Page (`dashboard.html`)
- `featured_properties`: List[Dict] with keys:
  - `property_id` (int), `address` (str), `location` (str), `price` (int), `property_type` (str), `bedrooms` (int), `bathrooms` (float), `square_feet` (int), `description` (str), `agent_id` (int), `status` (str)

### 4.2 Property Search Page (`property_search.html`)
- `properties`: List[Dict] all available properties, keys as above
- `filter_location`: str (optional filter value or empty string)
- `filter_price_min`: int or None
- `filter_price_max`: int or None
- `filter_property_type`: str or None

### 4.3 Property Details Page (`property_details.html`)
- `property`: Dict single property details (keys as above)
- `agent`: Dict with agent details:
  - `agent_id` (int), `agent_name` (str), `specialization` (str), `email` (str), `phone` (str), `properties_sold` (int)
- `is_favorite`: bool

### 4.4 Property Inquiry Page (`property_inquiry.html`)
- `properties`: List[Dict] properties for dropdown (keys as above)
- `submission_status`: str or None (Success or error message after submission)

### 4.5 My Inquiries Page (`my_inquiries.html`)
- `inquiries`: List[Dict] inquiries with keys:
  - `inquiry_id` (int), `property`: Dict (property details), `customer_name` (str), `customer_email` (str), `customer_phone` (str), `message` (str), `inquiry_date` (str YYYY-MM-DD), `status` (str)
- `status_filter`: str current selected status filter

### 4.6 My Favorites Page (`my_favorites.html`)
- `favorites`: List[Dict] favorite properties data combining:
  - favorite_id (int), added_date (str YYYY-MM-DD), with full property details keys as above

### 4.7 Agent Directory Page (`agent_directory.html`)
- `agents`: List[Dict] with keys:
  - `agent_id` (int), `agent_name` (str), `specialization` (str), `email` (str), `phone` (str), `properties_sold` (int)
- `search_query`: str current search input or empty string

### 4.8 Locations Page (`locations.html`)
- `locations`: List[Dict] with keys:
  - `location_id` (int), `location_name` (str), `region` (str), `average_price` (int), `property_count` (int), `description` (str)
- `sort_option`: str current sort option

---

## 5. Data Files and Formats

All data files are stored in a folder named `data/` and use the pipe `|` character as the delimiter.

### 5.1 Properties Data - `data/properties.txt`
- Fields with order and type:
  1. `property_id` (int)
  2. `address` (str)
  3. `location` (str)
  4. `price` (int)
  5. `property_type` (str: House, Apartment, Condo, Land)
  6. `bedrooms` (int)
  7. `bathrooms` (float)
  8. `square_feet` (int)
  9. `description` (str)
  10. `agent_id` (int)
  11. `status` (str: Available, Sold, etc.)

### 5.2 Locations Data - `data/locations.txt`
- Fields:
  1. `location_id` (int)
  2. `location_name` (str)
  3. `region` (str)
  4. `average_price` (int)
  5. `property_count` (int)
  6. `description` (str)

### 5.3 Property Inquiries Data - `data/inquiries.txt`
- Fields:
  1. `inquiry_id` (int)
  2. `property_id` (int)
  3. `customer_name` (str)
  4. `customer_email` (str)
  5. `customer_phone` (str)
  6. `message` (str)
  7. `inquiry_date` (str YYYY-MM-DD)
  8. `status` (str: Pending, Contacted, Resolved)

### 5.4 Favorite Properties Data - `data/favorites.txt`
- Fields:
  1. `favorite_id` (int)
  2. `property_id` (int)
  3. `added_date` (str YYYY-MM-DD)

### 5.5 Real Estate Agents Data - `data/agents.txt`
- Fields:
  1. `agent_id` (int)
  2. `agent_name` (str)
  3. `specialization` (str)
  4. `email` (str)
  5. `phone` (str)
  6. `properties_sold` (int)

---


## 6. Navigation Paths

Each page includes buttons or elements for navigation:
- From Dashboard:
  - `browse-properties-button` -> Property Search (`/search`)
  - `my-inquiries-button` -> My Inquiries (`/inquiries`)
  - `my-favorites-button` -> My Favorites (`/favorites`)

- From Property Search:
  - `view-property-button-{property_id}` -> Property Details (`/property/<int:property_id>`)

- From Property Details:
  - `add-to-favorites-button` -> adds property to favorites (POST action)
  - `submit-inquiry-button` -> Property Inquiry (`/inquiry/submit`)

- From Property Inquiry:
  - submission leads to success/error and retains form

- From My Inquiries:
  - `delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id}` -> deletes inquiry (POST)
  - `back-to-dashboard` -> Dashboard (`/`)

- From My Favorites:
  - `remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id}` -> removes from favorites (POST)
  - `view-property-button-{property_id}` -> Property Details (`/property/<int:property_id>`)
  - `back-to-dashboard` -> Dashboard (`/`)

- From Agent Directory:
  - `contact-agent-button-{agent_id}` for contacting agent (functionality defined elsewhere)
  - `back-to-dashboard` -> Dashboard (`/`)

- From Locations:
  - `view-location-button-{location_id}` -> property listings filtered by location (functionality to implement)
  - `location-sort` dropdown changes sort order
  - `back-to-dashboard` -> Dashboard (`/`)

---

This comprehensive specification aligns the two candidate designs into a single complete reference for development, ensuring unambiguous route definitions, template usage, element IDs, context variables, data files, and page navigation flows as per the user task requirements.


=== app.py ===
from flask import Flask, render_template, request, redirect, url_for
import os
from datetime import datetime

app = Flask(__name__)
DATA_DIR = 'data'

### Utility functions to read and write data from/to text files ###

def read_properties():
    path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'properties.txt')
    properties = []
    try:
        with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                line = line.strip()
                if line:
                    parts = line.split('|')
                    if len(parts) == 11:
                        property_id = int(parts[0])
                        address = parts[1]
                        location = parts[2]
                        price = int(parts[3])
                        property_type = parts[4]
                        bedrooms = int(parts[5])
                        bathrooms = float(parts[6])
                        square_feet = int(parts[7])
                        description = parts[8]
                        agent_id = int(parts[9])
                        status = parts[10]
                        properties.append({
                            'property_id': property_id,
                            'address': address,
                            'location': location,
                            'price': price,
                            'property_type': property_type,
                            'bedrooms': bedrooms,
                            'bathrooms': bathrooms,
                            'square_feet': square_feet,
                            'description': description,
                            'agent_id': agent_id,
                            'status': status
                        })
    except Exception:
        pass
    return properties

def read_locations():
    path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'locations.txt')
    locations = []
    try:
        with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                line = line.strip()
                if line:
                    parts = line.split('|')
                    if len(parts) == 6:
                        location_id = int(parts[0])
                        location_name = parts[1]
                        region = parts[2]
                        average_price = int(parts[3])
                        property_count = int(parts[4])
                        description = parts[5]
                        locations.append({
                            'location_id': location_id,
                            'location_name': location_name,
                            'region': region,
                            'average_price': average_price,
                            'property_count': property_count,
                            'description': description
                        })
    except Exception:
        pass
    return locations

def read_inquiries():
    path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'inquiries.txt')
    inquiries = []
    try:
        with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                line = line.strip()
                if line:
                    parts = line.split('|')
                    if len(parts) == 8:
                        inquiry_id = int(parts[0])
                        property_id = int(parts[1])
                        customer_name = parts[2]
                        customer_email = parts[3]
                        customer_phone = parts[4]
                        message = parts[5]
                        inquiry_date = parts[6]
                        status = parts[7]
                        inquiries.append({
                            'inquiry_id': inquiry_id,
                            'property_id': property_id,
                            'customer_name': customer_name,
                            'customer_email': customer_email,
                            'customer_phone': customer_phone,
                            'message': message,
                            'inquiry_date': inquiry_date,
                            'status': status
                        })
    except Exception:
        pass
    return inquiries

def read_favorites():
    path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'favorites.txt')
    favorites = []
    try:
        with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                line = line.strip()
                if line:
                    parts = line.split('|')
                    if len(parts) == 3:
                        favorite_id = int(parts[0])
                        property_id = int(parts[1])
                        added_date = parts[2]
                        favorites.append({
                            'favorite_id': favorite_id,
                            'property_id': property_id,
                            'added_date': added_date
                        })
    except Exception:
        pass
    return favorites

def read_agents():
    path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'agents.txt')
    agents = []
    try:
        with open(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                line = line.strip()
                if line:
                    parts = line.split('|')
                    if len(parts) == 6:
                        agent_id = int(parts[0])
                        agent_name = parts[1]
                        specialization = parts[2]
                        email = parts[3]
                        phone = parts[4]
                        properties_sold = int(parts[5])
                        agents.append({
                            'agent_id': agent_id,
                            'agent_name': agent_name,
                            'specialization': specialization,
                            'email': email,
                            'phone': phone,
                            'properties_sold': properties_sold
                        })
    except Exception:
        pass
    return agents

def write_inquiries(inquiries):
    path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'inquiries.txt')
    try:
        with open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for i in inquiries:
                line = f"{i['inquiry_id']}|{i['property_id']}|{i['customer_name']}|{i['customer_email']}|{i['customer_phone']}|{i['message']}|{i['inquiry_date']}|{i['status']}\n"
                f.write(line)
    except Exception:
        pass

def write_favorites(favorites):
    path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'favorites.txt')
    try:
        with open(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for favo in favorites:
                line = f"{favo['favorite_id']}|{favo['property_id']}|{favo['added_date']}\n"
                f.write(line)
    except Exception:
        pass

### Helper to get an agent by ID

def get_agent_by_id(agent_id):
    agents = read_agents()
    for agent in agents:
        if agent['agent_id'] == agent_id:
            return agent
    return None

### Helper to get property by ID

def get_property_by_id(property_id):
    properties = read_properties()
    for prop in properties:
        if prop['property_id'] == property_id:
            return prop
    return None

### Routes ###

@app.route('/')
def dashboard():
    properties = read_properties()
    # Featured properties: show first 5 available properties as recommendation
    featured_properties = [p for p in properties if p['status'] == 'Available'][:5]
    return render_template('dashboard.html', featured_properties=featured_properties)


@app.route('/search')
def property_search():
    properties = read_properties()
    # Filters from query args
    location = request.args.get('location', '').strip()
    price_min = request.args.get('price_min')
    price_max = request.args.get('price_max')
    property_type = request.args.get('property_type', '')

    # Convert price filters to int or None
    try:
        price_min_val = int(price_min) if price_min else None
    except:
        price_min_val = None
    try:
        price_max_val = int(price_max) if price_max else None
    except:
        price_max_val = None

    # Filter properties
    filtered = []
    for p in properties:
        if p['status'] != 'Available':
            continue
        if location and location.lower() not in p['location'].lower():
            continue
        if property_type and property_type != '':
            if property_type != p['property_type']:
                continue
        if price_min_val is not None and p['price'] < price_min_val:
            continue
        if price_max_val is not None and p['price'] > price_max_val:
            continue
        filtered.append(p)

    return render_template('property_search.html',
            properties=filtered,
            filter_location=location,
            filter_price_min=price_min_val,
            filter_price_max=price_max_val,
            filter_property_type=property_type
    )


@app.route('/property/<int:property_id>')
def property_details(property_id):
    properties = read_properties()
    property_obj = next((p for p in properties if p['property_id'] == property_id), None)
    if not property_obj:
        return "Property not found", 404

    agent = get_agent_by_id(property_obj['agent_id'])

    # Check if property is in favorites
    favorites = read_favorites()
    is_favorite = any(f['property_id'] == property_id for f in favorites)

    return render_template('property_details.html',
                           property=property_obj,
                           agent=agent,
                           is_favorite=is_favorite)


@app.route('/property/<int:property_id>/add_favorite', methods=['POST'])
def add_favorite(property_id):
    properties = read_properties()
    if not any(p['property_id'] == property_id for p in properties):
        return "Property not found", 404
    favorites = read_favorites()
    if not any(f['property_id'] == property_id for f in favorites):
        # Add favorite
        max_id = max([f['favorite_id'] for f in favorites], default=0)
        added_date = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
        favorites.append({'favorite_id': max_id+1, 'property_id': property_id, 'added_date': added_date})
        write_favorites(favorites)
    return redirect(url_for('property_details', property_id=property_id))


@app.route('/inquiry/submit', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
def property_inquiry():
    properties = read_properties()
    submission_status = None

    if request.method == 'POST':
        prop_id = request.form.get('select_property')
        name = request.form.get('inquiry_name', '').strip()
        email = request.form.get('inquiry_email', '').strip()
        phone = request.form.get('inquiry_phone', '').strip()
        message = request.form.get('inquiry_message', '').strip()

        if not prop_id or not name or not email or not message:
            submission_status = 'Please fill in all required fields.'
        else:
            try:
                prop_id_int = int(prop_id)
                properties_ids = [p['property_id'] for p in properties]
                if prop_id_int not in properties_ids:
                    submission_status = 'Selected property does not exist.'
                else:
                    inquiries = read_inquiries()
                    max_id = max([i['inquiry_id'] for i in inquiries], default=0)
                    today = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
                    new_inquiry = {
                        'inquiry_id': max_id + 1,
                        'property_id': prop_id_int,
                        'customer_name': name,
                        'customer_email': email,
                        'customer_phone': phone,
                        'message': message,
                        'inquiry_date': today,
                        'status': 'Pending'
                    }
                    inquiries.append(new_inquiry)
                    write_inquiries(inquiries)
                    submission_status = 'Inquiry submitted successfully.'
            except:
                submission_status = 'Invalid property selection.'

    return render_template('property_inquiry.html', properties=properties, submission_status=submission_status)


@app.route('/inquiries')
def my_inquiries():
    inquiries = read_inquiries()
    properties = read_properties()
    status_filter = request.args.get('status_filter', 'All')

    # Join inquiries with property details
    prop_dict = {p['property_id']: p for p in properties}
    filtered_inquiries = []
    for inq in inquiries:
        if status_filter == 'All' or inq['status'] == status_filter:
            prop = prop_dict.get(inq['property_id'], None)
            if prop:
                filtered_inquiries.append({
                    'inquiry_id': inq['inquiry_id'],
                    'property': prop,
                    'customer_name': inq['customer_name'],
                    'customer_email': inq['customer_email'],
                    'customer_phone': inq['customer_phone'],
                    'message': inq['message'],
                    'inquiry_date': inq['inquiry_date'],
                    'status': inq['status']
                })

    return render_template('my_inquiries.html', inquiries=filtered_inquiries, status_filter=status_filter)


@app.route('/inquiries/delete/<int:inquiry_id>', methods=['POST'])
def delete_inquiry(inquiry_id):
    inquiries = read_inquiries()
    inquiries = [inq for inq in inquiries if inq['inquiry_id'] != inquiry_id]
    write_inquiries(inquiries)
    return redirect(url_for('my_inquiries'))


@app.route('/favorites')
def my_favorites():
    favorites = read_favorites()
    properties = read_properties()
    prop_dict = {p['property_id']: p for p in properties}
    # Combine favorites with full property details
    combined = []
    for favo in favorites:
        prop = prop_dict.get(favo['property_id'], None)
        if prop:
            fav_copy = favo.copy()
            fav_copy.update(prop)
            combined.append(fav_copy)
    
    return render_template('my_favorites.html', favorites=combined)


@app.route('/favorites/remove/<int:property_id>', methods=['POST'])
def remove_favorite(property_id):
    favorites = read_favorites()
    favorites = [f for f in favorites if f['property_id'] != property_id]
    write_favorites(favorites)
    return redirect(url_for('my_favorites'))


@app.route('/agents')
def agent_directory():
    agents = read_agents()
    search_query = request.args.get('search_query', '').strip()
    filtered_agents = []
    if search_query == '':
        filtered_agents = agents
    else:
        search_lower = search_query.lower()
        filtered_agents = [agent for agent in agents if search_lower in agent['agent_name'].lower()]
    return render_template('agent_directory.html', agents=filtered_agents, search_query=search_query)


@app.route('/locations')
def locations_page():
    locations = read_locations()
    sort_option = request.args.get('sort_option', 'By Name')

    if sort_option == 'By Name':
        locations.sort(key=lambda loc: loc['location_name'].lower())
    elif sort_option == 'By Properties Count':
        locations.sort(key=lambda loc: loc['property_count'], reverse=True)
    elif sort_option == 'By Average Price':
        locations.sort(key=lambda loc: loc['average_price'], reverse=True)

    return render_template('locations.html', locations=locations, sort_option=sort_option)


@app.route('/locations/view/<int:location_id>')
def view_location_properties(location_id):
    # Show properties filtered by location
    properties = read_properties()
    location_obj = None
    locations = read_locations()
    for loc in locations:
        if loc['location_id'] == location_id:
            location_obj = loc
            break
    if not location_obj:
        return "Location not found", 404
    filtered_properties = [p for p in properties if p['location'] == location_obj['location_name'] and p['status'] == 'Available']
    return render_template('property_search.html', 
                           properties=filtered_properties, 
                           filter_location=location_obj['location_name'],
                           filter_price_min=None,
                           filter_price_max=None,
                           filter_property_type='')


if __name__ == '__main__':
    app.run(debug=True)

Write detailed validation_b.md report with actionable repair suggestions.\n=== user_task_description ===\n\n# Requirements Document for \'RealEstate\' Web Application\n\n## 1. Objective\nDevelop a comprehensive web application named \'RealEstate\' using Python, with data managed through local text files. The application enables users to browse property listings, search by location and price, view property details, submit inquiries, and manage favorite properties. No authentication required - all features are directly accessible. Note that the website should start from the Dashboard page.\n\n## 2. Language\nThe required development language for the \'RealEstate\' application is Python.\n\n## 3. Page Design\n\nThe \'RealEstate\' web application will consist of the following eight pages:\n\n### 1. Dashboard Page\n- **Page Title**: Real Estate Dashboard\n- **Overview**: The main hub displaying featured properties, recent listings, and quick navigation to all functionalities.\n- **Elements**:\n  - **ID: dashboard-page** - Type: Div - Container for the dashboard page.\n  - **ID: featured-properties** - Type: Div - Display of featured property recommendations.\n  - **ID: browse-properties-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to property search page.\n  - **ID: my-inquiries-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to inquiries page.\n  - **ID: my-favorites-button** - Type: Button - Button to navigate to favorites page.\n\n### 2. Property Search Page\n- **Page Title**: Property Search\n- **Overview**: A page displaying all available properties with advanced search and filter capabilities.\n- **Elements**:\n  - **ID: search-page** - Type: Div - Container for the search page.\n  - **ID: location-input** - Type: Input - Field to search properties by location/city.\n  - **ID: price-range-min** - Type: Input (number) - Field to set minimum price filter.\n  - **ID: price-range-max** - Type: Input (number) - Field to set maximum price filter.\n  - **ID: property-type-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by property type (House, Apartment, Condo, Land).\n  - **ID: properties-grid** - Type: Div - Grid displaying property cards with image, location, price, and beds/baths.\n  - **ID: view-property-button-{property_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view property details (each property card has this).\n\n### 3. Property Details Page\n- **Page Title**: Property Details\n- **Overview**: A page displaying detailed information about a specific property.\n- **Elements**:\n  - **ID: property-details-page** - Type: Div - Container for the property details page.\n  - **ID: property-address** - Type: H1 - Display property address.\n  - **ID: property-price** - Type: Div - Display property price.\n  - **ID: property-description** - Type: Div - Display property description.\n  - **ID: property-features** - Type: Div - Display property features (beds, baths, square footage).\n  - **ID: add-to-favorites-button** - Type: Button - Button to add property to favorites.\n  - **ID: submit-inquiry-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit inquiry for property.\n\n### 4. Property Inquiry Page\n- **Page Title**: Submit Property Inquiry\n- **Overview**: A page for users to submit inquiries for properties they are interested in.\n- **Elements**:\n  - **ID: inquiry-page** - Type: Div - Container for the inquiry page.\n  - **ID: select-property** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to select property for inquiry.\n  - **ID: inquiry-name** - Type: Input - Field to input customer name.\n  - **ID: inquiry-email** - Type: Input (email) - Field to input customer email.\n  - **ID: inquiry-phone** - Type: Input (tel) - Field to input customer phone.\n  - **ID: inquiry-message** - Type: Textarea - Field to write inquiry message.\n  - **ID: submit-inquiry-button** - Type: Button - Button to submit inquiry.\n\n### 5. My Inquiries Page\n- **Page Title**: My Inquiries\n- **Overview**: A page displaying all submitted inquiries and their status.\n- **Elements**:\n  - **ID: inquiries-page** - Type: Div - Container for the inquiries page.\n  - **ID: inquiries-table** - Type: Table - Table displaying inquiries with property, date, status, and contact info.\n  - **ID: inquiry-status-filter** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to filter by status (All, Pending, Contacted, Resolved).\n  - **ID: delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id}** - Type: Button - Button to delete inquiry (each inquiry has this).\n  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.\n\n### 6. My Favorites Page\n- **Page Title**: My Favorite Properties\n- **Overview**: A page displaying all properties added to favorites.\n- **Elements**:\n  - **ID: favorites-page** - Type: Div - Container for the favorites page.\n  - **ID: favorites-list** - Type: Div - List of all favorite properties with address, price, and action buttons.\n  - **ID: remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id}** - Type: Button - Button to remove property from favorites (each property has this).\n  - **ID: view-property-button-{property_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view property details (each property has this).\n  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.\n\n### 7. Agent Directory Page\n- **Page Title**: Real Estate Agents\n- **Overview**: A page displaying all real estate agents and their contact information.\n- **Elements**:\n  - **ID: agents-page** - Type: Div - Container for the agents page.\n  - **ID: agents-list** - Type: Div - List of all agents with photo, name, specialization, and contact info.\n  - **ID: agent-search** - Type: Input - Field to search agents by name.\n  - **ID: contact-agent-button-{agent_id}** - Type: Button - Button to contact agent (each agent has this).\n  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.\n\n### 8. Locations Page\n- **Page Title**: Featured Locations\n- **Overview**: A page displaying popular locations with property count and details.\n- **Elements**:\n  - **ID: locations-page** - Type: Div - Container for the locations page.\n  - **ID: locations-list** - Type: Div - List of all locations with name, property count, and average price.\n  - **ID: view-location-button-{location_id}** - Type: Button - Button to view properties in location (each location has this).\n  - **ID: location-sort** - Type: Dropdown - Dropdown to sort locations (By Name, By Properties Count, By Average Price).\n  - **ID: back-to-dashboard** - Type: Button - Button to navigate back to dashboard.\n\n## 4. Data Storage\n\nThe \'RealEstate\' application will store data locally in text files organized in the directory \'data\'. The following data formats and examples are defined:\n\n### 1. Properties Data\n- **File Name**: `properties.txt`\n- **Data Format**:\n  ```\n  property_id|address|location|price|property_type|bedrooms|bathrooms|square_feet|description|agent_id|status\n  ```\n- **Example Data**:\n  ```\n  1|123 Oak Street|Downtown|450000|House|3|2|2500|Beautiful family home with large yard|101|Available\n  2|456 Park Avenue|Midtown|350000|Apartment|2|1.5|1200|Modern apartment with city view|102|Available\n  3|789 Elm Road|Suburb|280000|Condo|2|2|1500|Cozy condo in quiet neighborhood|101|Sold\n  ```\n\n### 2. Locations Data\n- **File Name**: `locations.txt`\n- **Data Format**:\n  ```\n  location_id|location_name|region|average_price|property_count|description\n  ```\n- **Example Data**:\n  ```\n  1|Downtown|Central|425000|45|Urban area with business district\n  2|Midtown|Central|380000|38|Mixed residential and commercial zone\n  3|Suburb|Outskirts|295000|52|Family-friendly residential area\n  ```\n\n### 3. Property Inquiries Data\n- **File Name**: `inquiries.txt`\n- **Data Format**:\n  ```\n  inquiry_id|property_id|customer_name|customer_email|customer_phone|message|inquiry_date|status\n  ```\n- **Example Data**:\n  ```\n  1|1|John Smith|john@email.com|555-1234|Interested in viewing this weekend|2025-01-15|Pending\n  2|2|Sarah Johnson|sarah@email.com|555-5678|Can we schedule a showing?|2025-01-16|Contacted\n  3|1|Mike Davis|mike@email.com|555-9012|What is the lowest offer?|2025-01-17|Resolved\n  ```\n\n### 4. Favorite Properties Data\n- **File Name**: `favorites.txt`\n- **Data Format**:\n  ```\n  favorite_id|property_id|added_date\n  ```\n- **Example Data**:\n  ```\n  1|1|2025-01-10\n  2|2|2025-01-12\n  3|3|2025-01-14\n  ```\n\n### 5. Real Estate Agents Data\n- **File Name**: `agents.txt`\n- **Data Format**:\n  ```\n  agent_id|agent_name|specialization|email|phone|properties_sold\n  ```\n- **Example Data**:\n  ```\n  101|Robert Wilson|Residential Properties|robert@email.com|555-0001|125\n  102|Emily Chen|Commercial Real Estate|emily@email.com|555-0002|89\n  103|James Martinez|Luxury Homes|james@email.com|555-0003|67\n  ```\n\n\n=== design_spec.md ===\n# RealEstate Web Application - Consolidated Design Specification\n\n---\n\n## 1. Flask Routes and Page Details\n\n| Page Name           | Flask Route                        | HTTP Methods | Page Title               | Template Filename        | Description                                      |\n|---------------------|----------------------------------|--------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|--------------------------------------------------|\n| Dashboard           | `/`                              | GET          | Real Estate Dashboard    | dashboard.html           | Main hub; featured properties and navigation    |\n| Property Search     | `/search` (preferred) or `/properties` (alt.) | GET          | Property Search          | property_search.html     | List and filter properties                       |\n| Property Details    | `/property/<int:property_id>` (preferred) or `/properties/<int:property_id>` (alt.) | GET          | Property Details         | property_details.html    | Details of specific property                    |\n| Property Inquiry    | `/inquiry/submit` (preferred) or `/inquiries/new` (alt.) | GET, POST     | Submit Property Inquiry  | property_inquiry.html    | Form to submit inquiry                          |\n| My Inquiries        | `/inquiries`                     | GET          | My Inquiries             | my_inquiries.html        | List all user inquiries                         |\n| Delete Inquiry      | `/inquiries/delete/<int:inquiry_id>` | POST       | (action only)            | n/a                      | Delete a specific inquiry                       |\n| My Favorites        | `/favorites`                    | GET          | My Favorite Properties   | my_favorites.html        | List user\'s favorite properties                |\n| Remove Favorite     | `/favorites/remove/<int:property_id>` | POST       | (action only)            | n/a                      | Remove a property from favorites               |\n| Agent Directory     | `/agents`                      | GET          | Real Estate Agents       | agent_directory.html     | List and search agents                          |\n| Locations Page      | `/locations`                   | GET          | Featured Locations       | locations.html           | List popular locations                          |\n\n---\n\n## 2. Template Filenames\n\nStandardized the template filenames to the preferred form where possible:\n\n- dashboard.html\n- property_search.html\n- property_details.html\n- property_inquiry.html\n- my_inquiries.html\n- my_favorites.html\n- agent_directory.html\n- locations.html\n\nAlternate filenames used in candidate B (like properties_search.html, inquiries.html, favorites.html, agents.html) are consolidated to preferred consistent names matching candidate A.\n\n---\n\n## 3. Element and Button IDs\n\n### 3.1 Dashboard Page (`dashboard.html`)\n- `dashboard-page` (Div) - Container for dashboard page\n- `featured-properties` (Div) - Featured property recommendations\n- `browse-properties-button` (Button) - Navigate to Property Search page\n- `my-inquiries-button` (Button) - Navigate to My Inquiries page\n- `my-favorites-button` (Button) - Navigate to My Favorites page\n\n### 3.2 Property Search Page (`property_search.html`)\n- `search-page` (Div) - Container of search page\n- `location-input` (Input) - Filter input for location/city\n- `price-range-min` (Input number) - Minimum price filter\n- `price-range-max` (Input number) - Maximum price filter\n- `property-type-filter` (Dropdown) - Filter property type (House, Apartment, Condo, Land)\n- `properties-grid` (Div) - Grid for displaying property cards\n- Dynamic Button IDs:\n  - `view-property-button-{property_id}` (Button) for each listed property\n\n### 3.3 Property Details Page (`property_details.html`)\n- `property-details-page` (Div) - Container for property details\n- `property-address` (H1) - Displays address\n- `property-price` (Div) - Displays price\n- `property-description` (Div) - Property description\n- `property-features` (Div) - Beds, baths, square footage\n- `add-to-favorites-button` (Button) - Add property to favorites\n- `submit-inquiry-button` (Button) - Navigate to inquiry submission\n\n### 3.4 Property Inquiry Page (`property_inquiry.html`)\n- `inquiry-page` (Div) - Container for inquiry form\n- `select-property` (Dropdown) - Select property for inquiry\n- `inquiry-name` (Input) - Customer name\n- `inquiry-email` (Input email) - Customer email\n- `inquiry-phone` (Input tel) - Customer phone\n- `inquiry-message` (Textarea) - Inquiry message\n- `submit-inquiry-button` (Button) - Submit inquiry form\n\n### 3.5 My Inquiries Page (`my_inquiries.html`)\n- `inquiries-page` (Div) - Container for inquiries listing\n- `inquiries-table` (Table) - Table of inquiries\n- `inquiry-status-filter` (Dropdown) - Filter inquiries by status (All, Pending, Contacted, Resolved)\n- Dynamic Button IDs:\n  - `delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id}` (Button) for each inquiry delete action\n- `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Navigate to Dashboard\n\n### 3.6 My Favorites Page (`my_favorites.html`)\n- `favorites-page` (Div) - Container for favorites list\n- `favorites-list` (Div) - List of favorite properties\n- Dynamic Button IDs:\n  - `remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id}` (Button) to remove from favorites\n  - `view-property-button-{property_id}` (Button) to view property details\n- `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Navigate to Dashboard\n\n### 3.7 Agent Directory Page (`agent_directory.html`)\n- `agents-page` (Div) - Container for agents list\n- `agents-list` (Div) - List of agents\n- `agent-search` (Input) - Search agents by name\n- Dynamic Button IDs:\n  - `contact-agent-button-{agent_id}` (Button) to contact agent\n- `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Navigate to Dashboard\n\n### 3.8 Locations Page (`locations.html`)\n- `locations-page` (Div) - Container for locations list\n- `locations-list` (Div) - List of locations\n- Dynamic Button IDs:\n  - `view-location-button-{location_id}` (Button) to view location properties\n- `location-sort` (Dropdown) - Sort locations by Name, Properties Count, Average Price\n- `back-to-dashboard` (Button) - Navigate to Dashboard\n\n---\n\n## 4. Template Context Variables\n\n### 4.1 Dashboard Page (`dashboard.html`)\n- `featured_properties`: List[Dict] with keys:\n  - `property_id` (int), `address` (str), `location` (str), `price` (int), `property_type` (str), `bedrooms` (int), `bathrooms` (float), `square_feet` (int), `description` (str), `agent_id` (int), `status` (str)\n\n### 4.2 Property Search Page (`property_search.html`)\n- `properties`: List[Dict] all available properties, keys as above\n- `filter_location`: str (optional filter value or empty string)\n- `filter_price_min`: int or None\n- `filter_price_max`: int or None\n- `filter_property_type`: str or None\n\n### 4.3 Property Details Page (`property_details.html`)\n- `property`: Dict single property details (keys as above)\n- `agent`: Dict with agent details:\n  - `agent_id` (int), `agent_name` (str), `specialization` (str), `email` (str), `phone` (str), `properties_sold` (int)\n- `is_favorite`: bool\n\n### 4.4 Property Inquiry Page (`property_inquiry.html`)\n- `properties`: List[Dict] properties for dropdown (keys as above)\n- `submission_status`: str or None (Success or error message after submission)\n\n### 4.5 My Inquiries Page (`my_inquiries.html`)\n- `inquiries`: List[Dict] inquiries with keys:\n  - `inquiry_id` (int), `property`: Dict (property details), `customer_name` (str), `customer_email` (str), `customer_phone` (str), `message` (str), `inquiry_date` (str YYYY-MM-DD), `status` (str)\n- `status_filter`: str current selected status filter\n\n### 4.6 My Favorites Page (`my_favorites.html`)\n- `favorites`: List[Dict] favorite properties data combining:\n  - favorite_id (int), added_date (str YYYY-MM-DD), with full property details keys as above\n\n### 4.7 Agent Directory Page (`agent_directory.html`)\n- `agents`: List[Dict] with keys:\n  - `agent_id` (int), `agent_name` (str), `specialization` (str), `email` (str), `phone` (str), `properties_sold` (int)\n- `search_query`: str current search input or empty string\n\n### 4.8 Locations Page (`locations.html`)\n- `locations`: List[Dict] with keys:\n  - `location_id` (int), `location_name` (str), `region` (str), `average_price` (int), `property_count` (int), `description` (str)\n- `sort_option`: str current sort option\n\n---\n\n## 5. Data Files and Formats\n\nAll data files are stored in a folder named `data/` and use the pipe `|` character as the delimiter.\n\n### 5.1 Properties Data - `data/properties.txt`\n- Fields with order and type:\n  1. `property_id` (int)\n  2. `address` (str)\n  3. `location` (str)\n  4. `price` (int)\n  5. `property_type` (str: House, Apartment, Condo, Land)\n  6. `bedrooms` (int)\n  7. `bathrooms` (float)\n  8. `square_feet` (int)\n  9. `description` (str)\n  10. `agent_id` (int)\n  11. `status` (str: Available, Sold, etc.)\n\n### 5.2 Locations Data - `data/locations.txt`\n- Fields:\n  1. `location_id` (int)\n  2. `location_name` (str)\n  3. `region` (str)\n  4. `average_price` (int)\n  5. `property_count` (int)\n  6. `description` (str)\n\n### 5.3 Property Inquiries Data - `data/inquiries.txt`\n- Fields:\n  1. `inquiry_id` (int)\n  2. `property_id` (int)\n  3. `customer_name` (str)\n  4. `customer_email` (str)\n  5. `customer_phone` (str)\n  6. `message` (str)\n  7. `inquiry_date` (str YYYY-MM-DD)\n  8. `status` (str: Pending, Contacted, Resolved)\n\n### 5.4 Favorite Properties Data - `data/favorites.txt`\n- Fields:\n  1. `favorite_id` (int)\n  2. `property_id` (int)\n  3. `added_date` (str YYYY-MM-DD)\n\n### 5.5 Real Estate Agents Data - `data/agents.txt`\n- Fields:\n  1. `agent_id` (int)\n  2. `agent_name` (str)\n  3. `specialization` (str)\n  4. `email` (str)\n  5. `phone` (str)\n  6. `properties_sold` (int)\n\n---\n\n\n## 6. Navigation Paths\n\nEach page includes buttons or elements for navigation:\n- From Dashboard:\n  - `browse-properties-button` -> Property Search (`/search`)\n  - `my-inquiries-button` -> My Inquiries (`/inquiries`)\n  - `my-favorites-button` -> My Favorites (`/favorites`)\n\n- From Property Search:\n  - `view-property-button-{property_id}` -> Property Details (`/property/<int:property_id>`)\n\n- From Property Details:\n  - `add-to-favorites-button` -> adds property to favorites (POST action)\n  - `submit-inquiry-button` -> Property Inquiry (`/inquiry/submit`)\n\n- From Property Inquiry:\n  - submission leads to success/error and retains form\n\n- From My Inquiries:\n  - `delete-inquiry-button-{inquiry_id}` -> deletes inquiry (POST)\n  - `back-to-dashboard` -> Dashboard (`/`)\n\n- From My Favorites:\n  - `remove-from-favorites-button-{property_id}` -> removes from favorites (POST)\n  - `view-property-button-{property_id}` -> Property Details (`/property/<int:property_id>`)\n  - `back-to-dashboard` -> Dashboard (`/`)\n\n- From Agent Directory:\n  - `contact-agent-button-{agent_id}` for contacting agent (functionality defined elsewhere)\n  - `back-to-dashboard` -> Dashboard (`/`)\n\n- From Locations:\n  - `view-location-button-{location_id}` -> property listings filtered by location (functionality to implement)\n  - `location-sort` dropdown changes sort order\n  - `back-to-dashboard` -> Dashboard (`/`)\n\n---\n\nThis comprehensive specification aligns the two candidate designs into a single complete reference for development, ensuring unambiguous route definitions, template usage, element IDs, context variables, data files, and page navigation flows as per the user task requirements.\n\n\n=== app.py ===\nfrom flask import Flask, render_template, request, redirect, url_for\nimport os\nfrom datetime import datetime\n\napp = Flask(__name__)\nDATA_DIR = \'data\'\n\n### Utility functions to read and write data from/to text files ###\n\ndef read_properties():\n    path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, \'properties.txt\')\n    properties = []\n    try:\n        with open(path, \'r\', encoding=\'utf-8\') as f:\n            for line in f:\n                line = line.strip()\n                if line:\n                    parts = line.split(\'|\')\n                    if len(parts) == 11:\n                        property_id = int(parts[0])\n                        address = parts[1]\n                        location = parts[2]\n                        price = int(parts[3])\n                        property_type = parts[4]\n                        bedrooms = int(parts[5])\n                        bathrooms = float(parts[6])\n                        square_feet = int(parts[7])\n                        description = parts[8]\n                        agent_id = int(parts[9])\n                        status = parts[10]\n                        properties.append({\n                            \'property_id\': property_id,\n                            \'address\': address,\n                            \'location\': location,\n                            \'price\': price,\n                            \'property_type\': property_type,\n                            \'bedrooms\': bedrooms,\n                            \'bathrooms\': bathrooms,\n                            \'square_feet\': square_feet,\n                            \'description\': description,\n                            \'agent_id\': agent_id,\n                            \'status\': status\n                        })\n    except Exception:\n        pass\n    return properties\n\ndef read_locations():\n    path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, \'locations.txt\')\n    locations = []\n    try:\n        with open(path, \'r\', encoding=\'utf-8\') as f:\n            for line in f:\n                line = line.strip()\n                if line:\n                    parts = line.split(\'|\')\n                    if len(parts) == 6:\n                        location_id = int(parts[0])\n                        location_name = parts[1]\n                        region = parts[2]\n                        average_price = int(parts[3])\n                        property_count = int(parts[4])\n                        description = parts[5]\n                        locations.append({\n                            \'location_id\': location_id,\n                            \'location_name\': location_name,\n                            \'region\': region,\n                            \'average_price\': average_price,\n                            \'property_count\': property_count,\n                            \'description\': description\n                        })\n    except Exception:\n        pass\n    return locations\n\ndef read_inquiries():\n    path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, \'inquiries.txt\')\n    inquiries = []\n    try:\n        with open(path, \'r\', encoding=\'utf-8\') as f:\n            for line in f:\n                line = line.strip()\n                if line:\n                    parts = line.split(\'|\')\n                    if len(parts) == 8:\n                        inquiry_id = int(parts[0])\n                        property_id = int(parts[1])\n                        customer_name = parts[2]\n                        customer_email = parts[3]\n                        customer_phone = parts[4]\n                        message = parts[5]\n                        inquiry_date = parts[6]\n                        status = parts[7]\n                        inquiries.append({\n                            \'inquiry_id\': inquiry_id,\n                            \'property_id\': property_id,\n                            \'customer_name\': customer_name,\n                            \'customer_email\': customer_email,\n                            \'customer_phone\': customer_phone,\n                            \'message\': message,\n                            \'inquiry_date\': inquiry_date,\n                            \'status\': status\n                        })\n    except Exception:\n        pass\n    return inquiries\n\ndef read_favorites():\n    path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, \'favorites.txt\')\n    favorites = []\n    try:\n        with open(path, \'r\', encoding=\'utf-8\') as f:\n            for line in f:\n                line = line.strip()\n                if line:\n                    parts = line.split(\'|\')\n                    if len(parts) == 3:\n                        favorite_id = int(parts[0])\n                        property_id = int(parts[1])\n                        added_date = parts[2]\n                        favorites.append({\n                            \'favorite_id\': favorite_id,\n                            \'property_id\': property_id,\n                            \'added_date\': added_date\n                        })\n    except Exception:\n        pass\n    return favorites\n\ndef read_agents():\n    path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, \'agents.txt\')\n    agents = []\n    try:\n        with open(path, \'r\', encoding=\'utf-8\') as f:\n            for line in f:\n                line = line.strip()\n                if line:\n                    parts = line.split(\'|\')\n                    if len(parts) == 6:\n                        agent_id = int(parts[0])\n                        agent_name = parts[1]\n                        specialization = parts[2]\n                        email = parts[3]\n                        phone = parts[4]\n                        properties_sold = int(parts[5])\n                        agents.append({\n                            \'agent_id\': agent_id,\n                            \'agent_name\': agent_name,\n                            \'specialization\': specialization,\n                            \'email\': email,\n                            \'phone\': phone,\n                            \'properties_sold\': properties_sold\n                        })\n    except Exception:\n        pass\n    return agents\n\ndef write_inquiries(inquiries):\n    path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, \'inquiries.txt\')\n    try:\n        with open(path, \'w\', encoding=\'utf-8\') as f:\n            for i in inquiries:\n                line = f"{i[\'inquiry_id\']}|{i[\'property_id\']}|{i[\'customer_name\']}|{i[\'customer_email\']}|{i[\'customer_phone\']}|{i[\'message\']}|{i[\'inquiry_date\']}|{i[\'status\']}\\n"\n                f.write(line)\n    except Exception:\n        pass\n\ndef write_favorites(favorites):\n    path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, \'favorites.txt\')\n    try:\n        with open(path, \'w\', except Exception:\n        pass\n\n### Helper to get an agent by ID\n\ndef get_agent_by_id(agent_id):\n    agents = read_agents()\n    for agent in agents:\n        if agent[\'agent_id\'] == agent_id:\n            return agent\n    return None\n\n### Helper to get property by ID\n\ndef get_property_by_id(property_id):\n    properties = read_properties()\n    for prop in properties:\n \'\')\n\n    # Convert price filters to int or None\n    try:\n        price_min_val = int(price_min) if price_min else None\n    except:\n        price_min_val = None\n    try:\n        price_max_val = int(price_max) if price_max else None\n    except:\n        price_max_val = None\n\n    # Filter properties\n    filtered = []\n    for p in properties:\n        if p[\'status\'] != \'Available\':\n            continue\n        if location and location.lower() not in p[\'location\'].lower():\n            continue\n        if property_type and property_type != \'\':\n            if property_type != p[\'property_type\']:\n                continue\n        if price_min_val is not None and p[\'price\'] < price_min_val:\n            continue\n        if price_max_val is not None and p[\'price\'] > price_max_val:\n            continue\n        filtered.append(p)\n\n    return render_template(\'property_search.html\',\n            properties=filtered,\n            filter_location=location,\n
